hero.title: About EHA Industrial
hero.subtitle: Developing green, smart and sustainable industrial infrastructure

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: Built on Core. Driven by Value
story.content_1: EHA Industrial was established with a mission to develop green, smart and sustainable industrial infrastructure in Vietnam. We believe that a solid infrastructure foundation is the key to attracting investment and driving economic growth.
story.content_2: With a total investment of VND 900 billion, EHA Industrial is developing a pioneering project at Nam Dinh Vu Industrial Park — the only industrial park in Vietnam with an internal seaport, offering superior logistics advantages for domestic and international investors.
story.mission: Develop industrial infrastructure to international standards, creating sustainable value for investors, communities and the environment.
story.vision: Become the leading industrial infrastructure developer in Northern Vietnam, targeting 100+ hectares within 2 years.
